Custom Skating Banners for Ice Rinks & Figure Skating Events

Make the most of your next skating event with an eye-catching custom skating banner. From ice rink displays and figure skating competitions to hockey tournaments and arena sponsorship displays, we can help you improve your visibility and make an unforgettable first impression with our professionally designed custom skating banners.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver a skating banner that you're proud to display in your arena. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks.

Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of the skating banner industry and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a tailor-made skating banner for your ice rink or arena.

We offer a wide selection of custom skating banners and signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and you can choose production time to ensure your skating banner is delivered when you need it.

Six Customizable Banner Materials

Your skating banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All skating banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Due to the latest shipping regulations, all vinyl skating banners that exceed 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. If you do not want your skating banners folded, please contact us to get a custom freight quote.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Skating Banner Vinyl Materials for Indoor Arena Use

Choose from our selection of premium vinyl materials specifically suited for ice rink and arena environments. Our skating banner materials are designed to withstand indoor arena conditions while maintaining vibrant colors and crisp graphics.

13oz Vinyl Banner Material

Our standard 13oz vinyl provides excellent durability for indoor arena displays and is ideal for most skating banner applications.

Heavy Duty 18oz Vinyl

For skating banners requiring extra durability in high-traffic arena areas, our 18oz vinyl offers superior strength and longevity.

Fabric Banner Options

Fabric skating banners provide a premium appearance for upscale ice rinks and professional skating venues.

All skating banner materials are printed with UV-resistant inks to maintain color vibrancy under arena lighting conditions.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Arena Skating Banner Installation

Select the finishing options that work best for your ice rink or arena installation requirements.

Grommets

Brass grommets every 2 feet provide secure mounting points for arena wall and rafter installations.

Pole Pockets

Top and bottom pole pockets allow for easy suspension across ice rink areas using mounting hardware.

Hem & Tape

Reinforced hem and tape finishing provides clean edges and prevents fraying in arena environments.

Wind Slits

Available for skating banners installed in areas with air circulation from arena ventilation systems.

All finishing options are designed to ensure secure installation and long-lasting performance in ice rink environments.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Skating Banner Production & Turnaround Times

Choose your production timeline based on your skating event or ice rink installation schedule.

Standard Production: 3-5 Business Days

Perfect for planned skating events and arena displays with flexible timelines.

Rush Production: 1-2 Business Days

Available for urgent skating banner needs and last-minute tournament displays.

Same Day Production

Select skating banner sizes available for same-day completion when ordered before 12 PM CST.

Production Timeline Notes

  • Custom artwork review may add 1 business day to production time
  • Large format skating banners over 8'x8' may require additional production time
  • Complex designs with multiple colors may extend production timeline

Production times begin after artwork approval and do not include shipping time to your ice rink location.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Skating Banner Payment & Ordering Options

Convenient payment methods available for ice rinks, skating clubs, and arena management companies.

Credit Card Payment

We accept all major credit cards for immediate skating banner processing.

PayPal

Secure PayPal payments available for individual and business skating banner orders.

Net Terms for Qualifying Accounts

Ice rinks and skating organizations may qualify for net payment terms with approved credit applications.

Purchase Orders

We accept purchase orders from schools, municipalities, and established skating facilities.

Bulk Pricing

Volume discounts available for skating organizations ordering multiple banners or recurring seasonal displays.

Payment is processed securely through our encrypted checkout system to protect your information.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Skating Banner Delivery

Reliable shipping options to get your skating banners to your ice rink or arena on time.

Standard Ground Shipping

3-7 business day delivery to most ice rink locations via UPS or FedEx ground service.

Expedited Shipping

Next day and 2-day shipping available for urgent skating banner deliveries.

Freight Shipping for Large Banners

Skating banners over 8'x8' may require freight shipping to prevent folding during transit.

Local Delivery Options

Contact us for local delivery availability to ice rinks in our service area.

Shipping Protection

All skating banners are carefully packaged in protective tubes or boxes to prevent damage during shipping.

Tracking information is provided for all shipments so you can monitor your skating banner delivery progress.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Ice Rink & Arena Display Uses for Skating Banners

Custom skating banners serve multiple purposes in ice rink and arena environments.

Sponsorship Displays

Showcase sponsors and partners with prominent skating banner placement around your ice rink.

Tournament & Competition Signage

Welcome banners, event identification, and competition branding for skating tournaments.

Team & Club Recognition

Display team names, achievements, and skating club branding throughout your facility.

Safety & Instructional Signage

Ice safety rules, skating lessons information, and facility guidelines displayed on durable banners.

Seasonal & Holiday Displays

Skating banners for holiday skating events, summer camps, and seasonal programming.

Arena Branding

Permanent or semi-permanent facility branding and identification banners.

Skating banners provide versatile, cost-effective signage solutions for any ice rink or skating facility.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Custom Skating Banner Printing

Ensure optimal print quality for your skating banners with proper artwork specifications.

File Format Requirements

Preferred formats: PDF, AI, EPS, or high-resolution JPG/PNG files for skating banner artwork.

Resolution Guidelines

Minimum 150 DPI at full skating banner size for crisp, professional printing results.

Color Mode

CMYK color mode recommended for accurate color reproduction on skating banner materials.

Design Considerations

  • Include 0.25" bleed area around skating banner artwork edges
  • Keep important text and graphics at least 1" from finished edges
  • Use bold, readable fonts for arena viewing distances
  • Consider arena lighting when selecting colors

Professional Design Services

Our graphic design team can create custom skating banner artwork or modify existing designs to meet specifications.

Artwork Approval Process

Digital proofs are provided for all custom skating banner designs before production begins.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Skating Banners for Your Ice Rink Today

Ready to enhance your ice rink or arena with professional custom skating banners? Our experienced team is here to help you create the perfect signage solution for your skating facility.

Why Choose Banners.com for Your Skating Banners?

  • Over 20 years of experience in custom banner production
  • In-house graphic design team specialized in skating and sports signage
  • Premium materials designed for ice rink environments
  • Fast production times to meet your skating event deadlines
  • Competitive pricing for skating clubs and ice rink facilities

Get started on your skating banner project today using our online design tool, or contact our customer service team for assistance with custom specifications.

For special projects, unique sizes, or larger quantity skating banner orders, we can provide a custom quote tailored to your ice rink's specific needs.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Skating Banner Ordering Questions

What materials work best for ice rink skating banners?

Our 13oz vinyl material is ideal for most indoor ice rink applications, providing durability and vibrant colors. For high-traffic areas or permanent installations, consider our 18oz heavy-duty vinyl option.

Can skating banners be used in cold arena temperatures?

Yes, our vinyl materials are designed to perform well in cold ice rink environments. The material remains flexible and maintains its appearance in typical arena temperature ranges.

What finishing options work best for arena installation?

Grommets every 2 feet are popular for wall mounting, while pole pockets work well for suspension installations. Consider your specific mounting hardware and installation method when selecting finishing options.

How long do skating banners typically last in ice rink environments?

With proper installation and normal arena conditions, skating banners typically last 2-5 years depending on material choice and environmental factors.

Can you match our skating club or team colors?

Yes, our printing process can match specific colors. Provide Pantone color numbers or color samples for the most accurate color matching on your skating banners.

Do you offer installation services for ice rink banners?

We provide detailed installation instructions with all skating banner orders. For professional installation services, we can recommend local contractors in your area.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
